name: Swedish Castle Delight
recipeInstructions:
WHITE CASTLE BUNS: Toast White Castle buns on a cookie sheet, centers up, at 250°F until lightly browned. Cool and process into fine crumbs.
MEATBALLS: While buns toast, add to the White Castle hamburgers; onion, bacon, 3/4 cups crumbs, egg, milk, spices (allspice, nutmeg, ginger), brown sugar, black pepper, and salt. Mix well and form into 1-inch balls. Roll in corn meal. Brown in bacon fat. Set aside.
NOODLES: Cook noodles according to directions. Drain; stir in butter or olive oil; cover and keep warm.
SAUCE: In a bacon pan, add remaining crumbs, water, beef bouillon, and soy sauce. Mix well and cook 1 minute. Add cornstarch. Cook 2-3 minutes until smooth. Reduce heat, add meatballs, and stir to simmer for 1 minute. To serve: place noodles on a platter. Cover with meatballs and sauce, garnish with dill.
